raw_consumer_statement:
I have tried filing a dispute on a faulty product and returning it to the home depot store but the website is not allowing me to submit a dispute on the card. I Attempted dispute in XXXX of XXXX, over the purchase of a dryer and manufacture warranty not being honored. 

Interest payments on the credit card are also becoming extreme as i have paid over {$2000.00} in payments on the card but it has not affected the balance any when the promotion promised 12months no interest charges.
